name: DataForSEO
description: APIs providing SEO data: SERP results, keyword data, rank tracking, backlinks and related SEO metrics.

auth_methods.note: Official docs explicitly state DataForSEO uses HTTP Basic Authentication, using the account login and password in the Authorization: Basic header (Base64 of login:password).

credential_access.note: DataForSEO generally requires account signup; trial credits are commonly offered on signup.

api_surface.note: Docs are a single-page app mounted at /v3; surface appears to cover many SEO-related endpoints.

buildability.note: Signup (self-serve) is required to obtain credentials; otherwise API appears usable.
